name: Beef Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice in advance and let cool.
2. Dice all vegetables in advance.
3. Brown ground beef with 1/3 of the onion. Drain fat.
4. Remove the beef from the pan.
5. Add 1 teaspoon of oil to the pan and heat.
6. Add the beaten eggs and 1/3 of the onion. Cook until the eggs are lightly scrambled. Remove and put in a bowl.
7. Use the leftover oil in the pan and heat, then add carrots, green pepper, and onion. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
8. Add MSG, garlic powder, and cabbage. Cook for 1 minute.
9. Add ground beef to the mixture. Set the heat low.
10. Add rice and soy sauce; mix until well blended and serve. (Use fresh vegetables. Do not overcook.)
